name: Codebase Pattern Report
description: Search your codebase for a string or pattern and produce an AI-analyzed report

config.userPrompt:
Analyze the codebase search results below and produce a structured report.

## Output Format

### Summary
Total matches found, files affected, most common patterns.

### Findings by File
For each file with matches:
- Filename
- Match count
- Brief note on what the matches suggest (e.g. "3 TODOs around error handling")

### Priority Actions
Top 3-5 items worth addressing, ranked by apparent importance.

### Patterns & Themes
Any recurring patterns across files (same bug class, same tech debt area, etc.).

Be concise and actionable.

SEARCH RESULTS:
{{INPUT}}
